# axm_configuration (List Resource)

Searches for Apple Business Manager Configurations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "axm_configuration" "wifi_configurations" {
    provider = axm

    config {
        # Match Configurations that contain "Wi-Fi" in the name
        name_contains = "Wi-Fi"
    }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) Filters results by a case-insensitive exact Configuration name.
- `name_contains` (String) Filters results by a case-insensitive substring match on the Configuration name.
